name: dotnetExec
description: Load or run .NET assemblies using DotnetExec::init() actions.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

module_name.description: Short module name used for loaded assemblies, or the loaded module to run.

input_file.description: Assembly path for load. Required for action load.

type_for_dll.description: Fully-qualified type name for DLL load. Leave empty for EXE load.

method_name.description: Method name for runDll. Required for action runDll.
